name: Tikka Murgh
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the chicken, remove skin and debone it. Cut each leg into 4 pieces for a total of 24 tikka.
2. Whisk yogurt in a large bowl and add the remaining marinade ingredients. Mix well. Rub the chicken pieces with this mixture and let them marinate for 3 to 1/2 hours.
3. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
4. Skewer the marinated tikka at least an inch apart, placing a tray underneath to collect drippings.
5. Roast in a moderately hot tandoor for 6-7 minutes, basting once. In a charcoal grill or pre-heated oven, roast for about the same time, basting once. Make sure the chicken does not touch the sides or bottom of the oven.
